creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Another data point: Building sbcl for 10/11 i386/amd64 simultaneously on a 6-core system [1] with 32 GB of ram (bare metal) does not hit this problem.

http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/10i386-default/2018-10-06_14h23m57s/logs/sbcl-1.4.12,1.log
http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/10amd64-default/2018-10-06_14h23m57s/logs/sbcl-1.4.12,1.log
http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/11i386-default/2018-10-06_14h23m57s/logs/sbcl-1.4.12,1.log
http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/11amd64-default/2018-10-06_14h23m57s/logs/sbcl-1.4.12,1.log

[1] Xeon(R) CPU E3-1230 V2 @ 3.30GHznn
